prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `f3b10344`.
codex_response:
Implemented `f3b10344` as an ARC2 task package. The rule is: find same-colored filled rectangles that are clearly aligned horizontally or vertically, build cyan `8` bridges through the empty gap using the interior of the shared overlap band, and when those candidate bridges would form a same-color cycle, keep only the smaller-gap connections. The Opus hint was useful as a starting point, but I corrected its "`for every pair`" overstatement in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_f3b10344/notes.md); there was no Sonnet entry.

Official verification passed `4/4`, the shared builder produced 1000 verified examples, and I visually checked the generated preview sheet against the originals. No new primitive was added.
